title: Arlong’s Rule Tightens Around Nami
scene: On page 20, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. Usopp arrives ahead of the others and gets pulled into the fear surrounding Arlong’s domain.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong Pirates
dialogue.text: Nami's a member of the Arlong Pirates!?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Yup, she's pretty infamous around these parts.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Even that kid talked about her earlier, remember? She's the witch-woman he talked about.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: More surprising would be the fact that this is the house she grew up in!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: that witch and I are foster sisters.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Open the gates! I brought a suspicious- looking guy!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Let me just warn you beforehand that I ain't harmless...!

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
